title: Revenue Recognition with refunds and disputes
excerpt: Understand how refunds and disputes impact your revenue. Refunds and disputes can happen to any transaction on Stripe, which affects your revenue numbers. Stripe handles refunds and disputes in a similar manner, but the contra revenue generated go to the refunds and disputes accounts respectively. - Prior recognized revenue is offset by contra revenue in the refund or dispute account. - Deferred revenue that hasn’t been recognized is cleared. This next example is a one-time payment refund.
